hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qi 'git commit'; then if ! git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'CHANGELOG.md'; then echo 'CHANGELOG REQUIRED: CHANGELOG.md is not staged. Run /update-changelog, then git add CHANGELOG.md, before committing.'; fi; fi
